info.title: Lammah Game API
info.description: Runtime HTTP contract for Lammah game administration, content, and gameplay.

catalog.description: JSON string containing CreateCatalogDto or UpdateCatalogDto fields

banner.description: Optional catalog banner image (jpg, jpeg, png, webp)

category.description: JSON string containing CreateCategoryDto or UpdateCategoryDto fields
category.example: {"name":"Science","slug":"science","description":"Science and discovery questions","catalogId":"66b8f5f2c9d7a8b1e3f00223","sortOrder":0,"isActive":true,"aiConfig":{"knowledgeFile":"sports/world-cup.md","temperature":0.7,"preferredQuestionTypes":["historical moments","records","finals"],"avoidTopics":["winner of 2022","host country 2022"],"extraInstructions":"Focus on fun offline party-game questions."},"gameplayConfig":{"gameModes":{"trivia":30,"identifyCharacter":30,"identifyVoice":20,"completeQuote":20},"supportedAssetTypes":["text","image","audio","quote","emoji","timeline"],"preferredDifficultyMix":{"easy":30,"medium":50,"hard":20},"maxAudioDuration":6,"imageRevealAllowed":true,"allowMultipleAssets":false}}

banner.description: Optional category banner image (jpg, jpeg, png, webp)

extraInstructions.example: Focus on fun offline party-game questions.

questionTypes.description: Legacy field. Prefer gameModes for new categories.
